title: How to Do Great Work
description: The key question to ask before taking on any project: is this the kind of thing that could be great? Paul Graham on finding and pursuing work that matters.

title: Your Life in Weeks
description: A visual look at the brevity of a human life — and why that's not depressing at all, but completely freeing.

title: Keep Your Identity Small
description: The more you identify with a label, the less you can think clearly about it. Paul Graham on why keeping your identity small makes you smarter.

title: The Most Useful Mental Models
description: A curated collection of thinking frameworks that will permanently change how you see every decision in life.

title: Effort
description: On the quiet kind of effort that nobody sees — the one that happens before you're ready, before it's perfect, before anyone notices.
